name: Pega_Extensions_SearchLayout
label: Search Layout
description: Two-pane search layout with configurable search criteria pane and results pane. Supports resizable vertical split and collapsible horizontal stacking.

properties.name: layoutDirection
properties.label: Layout Direction
properties.description: Vertical: side-by-side split (resizable). Horizontal: stacked top-to-bottom (collapsible).

properties.name: searchColumns
properties.label: Search Pane Layout
properties.description: Number of columns for the search criteria fields.

properties.name: searchFieldPane
properties.label: Search Field Pane
properties.description: Drop fields that make up the search criteria form.

properties.name: resultsPlaceholder
properties.label: Results Placeholder Text
properties.description: Text shown in the results pane before the user clicks Search.
properties.defaultValue: Enter search criteria and click Search.

properties.name: resultsPane
properties.label: Results Pane
properties.description: Drop a view that renders the search results.

properties.name: searchPaneTitle
properties.label: Search Pane Title
properties.description: Header text shown above the search criteria fields.

properties.name: resultsPaneTitle
properties.label: Results Pane Title
properties.description: Header text shown above the results view.

properties.name: searchButtonLabel
properties.label: Search Button Label
properties.description: Label for the search / submit button.

properties.name: resetButtonLabel
properties.label: Reset Button Label
properties.description: Label for the reset / clear button.
